last_result: The six-run BP FME pilot completed after one infrastructure-only import-path repair and same-coordinate resume. The frozen gate returned mechanism_only: 0/3 heldout direction, 0.0% median worst-gap reduction, bootstrap interval [0.0, 0.0], but 14 new behavior profiles, 3 supported development-only claims, and 4 admitted counterexamples. Offline audit found FME transfer-action collapse (48/60 e2+m2, 0 m1) and lower valid generation (14/60 versus control 44/60), while both arms shared an unmodeled online-order weakness. No additional LLM runs are scheduled.
